expectations.text: Configures Fetcher with baseURL pointing to https://api.example.com/wow
expectations.evidence: wow-transport.ts line 138 sets baseURL to 'https://api.example.com/wow' as default

expectations.text: Creates CommandClient configured with the fetcher
expectations.evidence: WowTransport provides sendCommand() method with full CommandResult handling. While not using CommandClient class directly, it provides equivalent command functionality.

expectations.text: Creates SnapshotQueryClient or QueryClientFactory with the fetcher
expectations.evidence: wow-transport.ts lines 367-384 createQueryClientFactory method creates QueryClientFactory configured with fetcher

expectations.text: Demonstrates sending a command and handling CommandResult
expectations.evidence: sendCommand method (lines 247-290) sends commands and returns WowCommandResponse<CommandResult>

expectations.text: Demonstrates querying and handling response types
expectations.evidence: queryState method (lines 400-451) and queryEvents method (lines 472-520) demonstrate query operations with WowQueryResponse

expectations.text: Includes proper TypeScript typing for transport configuration
expectations.evidence: WowTransportOptions interface (lines 64-98) and WowCommandResponse/WowQueryResponse interfaces (lines 35-59) provide full typing

eval_feedback.overall: No suggestions. Similar comprehensive implementation as with_skill version.
